improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade decisions. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Get instant AI-powered answers for trade and business decisions. Try Gideon free today.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical channels for reaching business owners and professionals. Including the three free searches hook in descriptions drives trial sign-ups.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Partner"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and professional guidance for your business operations. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline positions Gideon as a collaborative partner rather than just a tool, building trust with business professionals. The subheading clearly communicates the three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional guidance) while prominently featuring the free trial offer to reduce friction and encourage immediate engagement. The word 'Meet' personalizes the AI assistant experience.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and Gideon's full professional capabilities.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition, pricing, and added benefits, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and encourages conversion by framing membership as valuable rather than restrictive.
